name: Mushroom Pudding (English)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Mushrooms, wiped, trimmed and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour, salt, and suet together in a bowl.
2. Gradually add cold water to form a soft dough.
3. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and roll it out.
4. Use two-thirds of the dough to line a greased 2-pint pudding basin, reserving the remaining one-third for the lid. Seal any gaps well.
5. Mix the onion, mushrooms, and bacon together in a separate bowl, then season. Place this mixture into the center of the pudding, adding a little stock or water.
6. Add the dough lid, pressing the edges firmly together to seal. Seal with a little water.
7. Cover the basin with a circle of greaseproof paper and secure with kitchen foil.
8. Place the pudding on a stand in a saucepan and pour boiling water around it until about halfway up the basin. Continue to cover with water or stock as necessary, topping up periodically during cooking.
9. Cook for 2 to 2 and a half hours, stirring occasionally.
10. Serve with potatoes and a green vegetable.
